title: Smoking status review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

assessment.text: Supports current and former tobacco status, product use, willingness and readiness to quit, previous attempts, motivation, confidence, barriers, and dependence assessment including smoking rate and time to first cigarette.
assessment.rationale: Relevant to entered product use, rate, time-to-first-use, readiness, attempts and barriers without calculating dependence automatically.
assessment.evidence_extract: Supports current and former tobacco status, product use, willingness and readiness to quit, previous attempts, motivation, confidence, barriers, and dependence assessment including smoking rate and time to first cigarette.

source.title: Practical Guideline for Management of Tobacco Dependence

exact_section.heading: The 5 As and Identification and Assessment of Tobacco Use Status

treatment_and_management.text: Supports documenting recent abstinence, remaining challenges, relapse risk, prior success, repeated intervention, and follow-up.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Relevant to documented abstinence and relapse context for former users without asserting success or failure.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports documenting recent abstinence, remaining challenges, relapse risk, prior success, repeated intervention, and follow-up.

source.title: Practical Guideline for Management of Tobacco Dependence

exact_section.heading: Former tobacco users, relapse potential, and behavioural intervention summary

follow_up.text: Supports healthcare-provider use, tobacco-status identification and documentation, cessation support, and second-hand-smoke exposure context.
follow_up.rationale: Relevant to clinician documentation of tobacco-status review and second-hand exposure without inferring status.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports healthcare-provider use, tobacco-status identification and documentation, cessation support, and second-hand-smoke exposure context.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Product, status, amount, duration, exposure, dependence, quit attempts, readiness, pregnancy and comorbidity are absent.
No tobacco status, dependence, counseling, medicine, dose or referral is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
